description: Output schema for codex exec adversarial code review

findings.description: Individual issues found in the code

title.description: Short one-line summary of the issue

body.description: Detailed explanation of the issue and how to fix it

verbatim_line.description: Exact substring (10+ chars) copied verbatim from the diff hunk that contains the issue. Used by the harness to verify the finding cites real code; findings whose verbatim_line does not appear in the diff are dropped.

confidence_score.description: Confidence that this is a real issue (0-1). May be null if not provided.

absolute_file_path.description: Absolute path to the file containing the issue. May be null when the location is uncertain.

line_range.description: Line range, e.g. '42-55'. May be null when the line is uncertain.

overall_correctness.description: patch is correct = APPROVE; patch is incorrect = REQUEST_CHANGES

overall_explanation.description: One-paragraph overall assessment of the patch

overall_confidence_score.description: Overall confidence in the correctness assessment (0-1)
